title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple API and Docker support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python library.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration to use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embeddings in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat endpoints).

title: ollama-cli (maccam912/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive REPL wrapper around Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot (saharNooby/ollama-copilot)
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models as inline GitHub Copilot replacements.

title: ollama4j (ollama4j/ollama4j)
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama with Kotlin extensions and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rag (ggerganov/ollama-rag)
summary: Lightweight RAG example using Ollama embeddings and llama.cpp for vector search.

title: ollama-discord (rizerphe/ollama-discord)
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that exposes Ollama models to servers with slash commands.

title: ollama-helm (jameskim0987/ollama-helm)
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama server and web-ui on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-nvim (nomnivore/ollama-nvim)
summary: Neovim plugin to query Ollama models inside buffers for code explanation or generation.

title: ollama-express (dmatora/ollama-express)
summary: Express.js starter that mounts OpenAI-compatible endpoints backed by Ollama for quick SaaS prototypes.

title: ollama-obsidian (EthanGahm/ollama-obsidian)
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLMs on your notes via Ollama for summarization or Q&A.

title: ollama-swift (kevinhermawan/ollama-swift)
summary: Swift Package Manager client for Ollama targeting macOS/iOS apps wanting local LLM access.

title: ollama-rust (mdrokz/ollama-rust)
summary: Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API with tokio.

title: ollama-telegram (swapagarwal/ollama-telegram)
summary: Telegram bot that lets users chat with any Ollama model through inline queries or DM.

title: ollama-slack (krrishd/ollama-slack)
summary: Slack Bolt app to mention @Ollama and get local LLM replies in channels or threads.

title: ollama-haystack (anakin87/ollama-haystack)
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-django (ishaan-jaff/ollama-django)
summary: Django package adding Ollama LLM and embedding backends with admin UI controls.
